purpose: Disaster Recovery (DR) spec — Cloudflare R2 source bucket → 2 destination region buckets. Sync interval 1h via cron-driven rclone. NO actual replicate triggered by this spec.
do_not_execute_warning: This file is SPEC ONLY. Running the rclone command without operator approval will incur R2 egress costs and may collide with active training. Activation requires explicit go-ahead post-CP2.

destinations.purpose: Geographic DR (EU) + GDPR-friendly residency option for future EU collab.
destinations.endpoint_status: PENDING — DR account/bucket not yet provisioned

destinations.purpose: Geographic DR (APAC) + low-latency restore for Korea/Japan operator location.
destinations.endpoint_status: PENDING — DR account/bucket not yet provisioned

rclone_command_template.preflight_check: rclone lsd r2-source: && rclone lsd r2-dr-eu: && rclone lsd r2-dr-apac:
rclone_command_template.dry_run_first: append --dry-run before any first execution; verify object count and bytes

rclone_config_template.remote_block_template_source:
[r2-source]
type = s3
provider = Cloudflare
access_key_id = <REDACTED>
secret_access_key = <REDACTED>
endpoint = https://ce4bdcce7c74d4e3c78fdf944c4d1d7b.r2.cloudflarestorage.com
acl = private
rclone_config_template.remote_block_template_dst_eu:
[r2-dr-eu]
type = s3
provider = Cloudflare
access_key_id = <REDACTED>
secret_access_key = <REDACTED>
endpoint = https://<DR_ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com
region_hint = EEUR
acl = private
rclone_config_template.remote_block_template_dst_apac:
[r2-dr-apac]
type = s3
provider = Cloudflare
access_key_id = <REDACTED>
secret_access_key = <REDACTED>
endpoint = https://<DR_ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com
region_hint = APAC
acl = private
rclone_config_template.credential_loading_policy: Read access keys from ENV (R2_DR_EU_ACCESS_KEY etc.) or 1Password CLI; never persist plain in repo or rclone.conf checked-in copy.

schedule.launchd_plist_status: NOT_CREATED — activation gate requires K58 go-ahead
schedule.concurrency_guard: use rclone --syslog-level WARNING + lock file /var/lock/anima_r2_sync.lock to prevent overlapping runs
schedule.activity_window: skip sync during active training write-window (R01 NFS I/O rule; check ps aux | grep train_alm)

monitoring.success_signal: rclone exit 0 + log line 'Transferred: ...' + rclone check 0 mismatches
failure_actions: exit != 0 → write state/r2_sync_dr_failure.json with timestamp + dst id + log tail
post-sync rclone check mismatch > 0 → mark as DEGRADED + notify via airgenome dispatch (#K58 alert)
consecutive 3 failure → suspend cron + require manual intervention (R12 analog — 'do not auto-resume DR')

cost_estimate.r2_egress_per_gb: $0 (CF R2 free egress is the design choice)

activation_checklist: [ ] DR Cloudflare account/sub-account provisioned with EEUR + APAC bucket created
[ ] R2 access keys minted scoped only to DR buckets (write) + source bucket (read-only)
[ ] rclone.conf populated locally on operator workstation/scheduler host
[ ] First sync executed with --dry-run; object count + bytes manually approved
[ ] First real sync executed manually (no cron); rclone check 0 mismatches
[ ] launchd plist landed and tested via tool/launchd_install_local.bash --dry-run

audit_notes.fake_pass_guard: Spec only; no rclone command executed by this file. DR buckets do not exist yet.
audit_notes.uchg_note: Not uchg-locked; endpoints/regions may be revised pre-activation.
